code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut total = 0
  mut running = true

  while i < parts.len() and running
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      match string.parse_int(s)
      when Some(n)
        if total + n > 100
          running = false
        else
          total = total + n
          i = i + 1
        end
      when None
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      running = false
    end
  end

  print("total=#{total}")
  Ok(())
end
